author: kevintruby
subject: feat: expose `createSuitMixin` to use for class names in custom widgets (algolia/vue-instantsearch#721)
body:
While using the `createWidgetMixin`, there is no easy way to reproduce
all the DOM classes typically generated for widget components; the mixin
used internally is not exposed for consumption in production environments.

Would like to be able to leverage the same pattern when wrapping
additional template around existing components.
